title: Dekton 9" Pro Clamp with 100mm Jaw Opening, Heavy Duty Rubber Non-Slip Grip, Durable Tough Plastic Construction, Hinged Jaws for Improved Grip on Uneven Surfaces, Ideal for Woodworking & DIY Projects
features: Versatile Clamping: The Dekton 9" Pro Clamp features a generous 100mm jaw opening, making it suitable for a wide range of woodworking and DIY projects. Its ability to accommodate various materials ensures a secure hold for your tasks, whether you're assembling furniture or securing parts during cutting.

Durable Construction: Crafted from tough plastic, this pro clamp is designed for heavy-duty use. Its robust build ensures longevity, allowing it to withstand the rigors of frequent use in workshops, garages, or job sites, making it a reliable tool in your collection.

Enhanced Grip: The heavy-duty rubber non-slip grip provides superior comfort and control during use. This feature minimizes hand fatigue, allowing for prolonged clamping without compromising on safety or effectiveness, making your work more efficient.

Hinged Jaws Design: The hinged jaws improve grip on uneven surfaces, providing stability and security even on irregular materials. This design ensures consistent pressure across the surface, preventing slippage and ensuring precise work results.

Easy Operation: The simple one-handed operation allows for quick adjustments and secure clamping, enhancing productivity. Whether you're a professional or a DIY enthusiast, this clamp simplifies your workflow, making it an essential tool for any project.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience. Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations. All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide. DEKTON 9" PRO CLAMP 9" (230mm) pro clamp. 100mm jaw opening. Heavy duty rubber non-slip grip. Durable pro clamp made from tough plastic. Hinged jaws for a better grip on uneven surfaces.
